title: Oxo 4 Piece Mini Measuring Beaker Set 1263680
description:
About this item
The OXO Good Grips 4-Piece Nesting Measuring Beaker Set makes prepping liquid ingredients like oil, vinegar, extracts, food coloring and milk quick and easy.
All Beakers are made with sturdy, BPA-free construction and easy-read measurement markings.
When you’re finished, clean the Beakers in the top rack of the dishwasher and nest for simple storage.
The Set includes 2-oz, 1-oz, 1-Tsp and 1-tsp Beakers.
reviews_5s: These are great. I am on weight watchers and have to measure everything. Super easy to read. They store easy in nesting style. I put mine in the dishwasher, they clean up great.Easy to storage. Love the size and it’s functionalThis is easy to use for small portions especially liquids. Also, they have multiple measuring units labeled on the beaker. And it has a nice base to stay put on counter.These measuring tools are perfect for small portions, especially for measuring liquids. They are microwave and dishwasher-safe. Oxo makes excellent cookware.Buying new laundry soap that only uses 15ml per load and didn't like the measuring cup that comes included with the soap. The smallest of this measuring set is perfect!I keep a set in my kitchen and laundry room. Love these for mixing cleaning chemicals as much as I enjoy them in my kitchen. Love that they set up on their own, easy to read, easy to stack & store.Easy to use and clean. Has accurate easy to read measurements.These are great for measuring small amounts. We trial a lot of cocktails and don't necessarily want to make full drinks. These let us make small versions very easily. Only downside is that you need to clean them out before residual liquid dries to the bottom, otherwise it's a little hard to clean.I use the all the time. I love they save space.I broke my antique glass tiny measuring cup for liquids and stumbled across this set and decided to give it a try. I am very that I did as it gives you various measuring options for liquid in which you just need small amounts. I have run these through the dishwasher, they did just fine. They are worth the money, I will buy another set for my daughter as she is quite the cook. I do recommend these measuring utensils.
reviews_1s: Inaccurate measuements. These are inaccurate measuring cups. This picture shows 1 Tbsp that I poured in from a tablespoon measuring spoon, to double check measurements. As you can see it is less than the mark for a tablespoon on the cup.
